title: Weather Sirenz
description: Weather Sirens for 1.21.1 ProtoManly's Weather mod, your free to use this in mod packs, videos etc, do what you want, just don't say its urs plz
body: ![Sentry 16V, Modulator, Model2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1afd6979aa96029147e2a3b034a36d01c01fb276_0.webp)Added custom redstone powered warning sirens, these range from Federal signal to Sentry sirens, and more sirens to be added in the future. sirens also have GUI's to manually test the sirens and or set them off. more to this feature is to come.
